message:
refactor(encoding): deduplicate Snappy module

Move Snappy decompression to shared src/encoding/snappy.zig, removing
330 lines of duplicated code between parquet/snappy.zig and orc/snappy.zig.

- Create shared encoding/snappy.zig module
- Update parquet and ORC to import from shared module
- Delete duplicate parquet/snappy.zig and orc/snappy.zig
- Add snappy module dependency in build.zig
